description_long: This is a grand piano with a glossy black finish, featuring a curved body and an open lid that reveals the golden-colored soundboard and internal strings. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, and a padded, tufted black bench is positioned in front of the instrument. The piano stands on three sturdy legs, each capped with gold-colored casters, and the pedals are visible beneath the keyboard. The lid is propped open with a support stick, allowing a clear view of the intricate internal mechanics. The overall design is elegant and classic, suitable for concert halls or upscale urban environments. The piano's surfaces are smooth and reflective, emphasizing its high-quality craftsmanship.
description: A glossy black grand piano with an open lid, gold accents, and a matching padded bench. The keyboard and internal strings are visible, highlighting its elegant and classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three pedals, and the padded bench directly in front.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open lid, internal strings, and the curved body profile with gold casters on the legs.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the curved back, the open lid, and the exposed soundboard and strings.
description_view_3: Side view with the lid open, showing the length of the piano and the bench, with less visibility of the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
